key.name: backend-port
key.description: Port the glance Node.js backend listens on (127.0.0.1 only).

key.name: backend-path
key.description: Absolute path to the glance backend entry point. If empty, the extension looks in the install directory and ~/repos/glance/server/server.js.

key.name: auto-start-backend
key.description: If true, the extension spawns the backend on enable and stops it on disable.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often the dashboard polls /api/state. Minimum 5.

key.name: dropdown-width-pct
key.description: Width of the dashboard dropdown as a percentage of the monitor width. 30–100.
